target_audience: Student enrolled nurses and healthcare professionals in Australia
design_philosophy: Apple Health meets a professional medical app. Clean, un-cluttered, high-contrast, data-centric. No pure glassmorphism over data areas, strictly Flat Solid design.

typography.heading: Manrope
rules: No generic sans like Inter for Headings.
Overlines / Labels MUST be Uppercase + Tiny + Wide Spacing (tracking-[0.2em]).
Body text MUST be minimum 16px (text-base) for clinical readability.
Use explicit weights: font-medium for standard text, font-bold for data points.
Never use pure black or grey. Use the semantic colors strictly for the categories outlined.
Use #1B3A6B (Deep Navy) for all primary actions and main headings.
Use #00A99D (Teal) for secondary accents and selected states.

layout_and_spacing.strategy: Mobile-first PWA, optimized for one-handed use.
layout_and_spacing.container: w-full max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen bg-white relative pb-20 shadow-2xl overflow-hidden
layout_and_spacing.spacing: Generous spacing. Tailwind scale: p-4, p-6, p-8. Containers with borders must have internal padding.
layout_and_spacing.grid: High Density Grid for Dashboards/Calculators, Bento Grid for Categories (e.g. grid-cols-2 gap-4).

cards.style: Flat Solid. bg-[#F4F6F9]. Subtle rounded corners (rounded-2xl). NO HEAVY SHADOWS. Medical apps require data clarity without visual refraction.
cards.border: 1px solid #E5E7EB if needed for visual separation.

buttons.primary: Pill-shaped (rounded-full) or large touch targets (min-h-[48px]). bg-[#1B3A6B] text-white hover:bg-[#152e55] active:scale-95 transition-transform.
buttons.emergency_fab: Always visible floating red emergency button. bg-[#EF4444] text-white rounded-full p-4 shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(239,68,68,0.4)] fixed bottom-24 right-4 z-50 flex items-center justify-center h-14 w-14.

bottom_navigation.style: Fixed bottom (bottom-0 left-0 right-0 max-w-md mx-auto). bg-white/95 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-gray-100 pb-safe pt-2 h-20 grid grid-cols-5 items-center justify-items-center z-40.
bottom_navigation.active_state: text-[#1B3A6B] flex flex-col items-center gap-1 font-medium text-xs
bottom_navigation.inactive_state: text-gray-400 flex flex-col items-center gap-1 font-normal text-xs transition-colors hover:text-gray-600

search_bar.style: bg-[#F4F6F9] rounded-2xl h-12 px-4 flex items-center gap-3 text-base text-gray-900 placeholder:text-gray-500 w-full

visual_enhancers.icons: lucide-react. Stroke-width 2 or 2.5 for clarity. High legibility required.
visual_enhancers.motion: Fast, crisp transitions (150-200ms ease). Nurses are rushed, do not add sluggish animations. Micro-interactions on tap/active states only (e.g. active:scale-95).

images.description: Nurse in scrubs caring for a patient, demonstrating healthcare services.
Medical students in a hallway discussing notes.

accessibility.contrast: Must meet WCAG 2.1 AA. Normal text below 18px minimum 4.5:1. Primary navy and accent teal provide strong contrast against white.
accessibility.test_ids: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the application inside a 'Mobile Frame' container (`max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen relative shadow-2xl overflow-hidden bg-white`) so it behaves like a strict PWA mobile app even on desktop.
Do NOT center align content blocks. Data, lists, and forms must be left-aligned for fast scanning.
Use solid flat design, avoid glassmorphism for medical data areas. Use glassmorphism ONLY for the bottom navigation bar.
Implement the persistent Bottom Navigation component with 5 tabs: Home, Search, Calculators, AI Chat, More.
Implement the persistent Floating Action Button (FAB) for Emergencies, positioned above the bottom nav.
Color code specific sections based on the semantic palette provided (e.g., Orange for Emergency category, Blue for Info, Green for Safe).
Keep backgrounds stark white, use soft grey (`#F4F6F9`) only for cards and search inputs.
Add `pb-24` padding to the main scrollable container to ensure the bottom nav doesn't cover content.
Never use generic placeholder text; implement context-appropriate clinical text.
When building Calculators or Drug references, ensure the numbers and critical data are large, bold, and highly legible.
Add 'Australian' contextual details (e.g. AHPRA, NMBA, Australian SI units).
universal_guidelines: Do not converge toward generic outputs.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy, but keep cards flat.
NEVER use emoji characters for icons. Use lucide-react.
Use 2-3x more spacing. Cramped designs look cheap.
Components MUST use named exports, Pages MUST use default exports.
